channel.title: Home on Muhammad Gaffar
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Muhammad Gaffar

item.title: Why Reading Tao's Analysis
item.description: An Introduction to Book reading journey on Analysis I by Terence Tao.

item.title: Faith is Not Blind Conformity
item.description: Faith only makes sense after the use of reflection, reason, or spiritual certainty.

item.title: File-over-app Digital Philosophy
item.description: The philosophy that controlling files is much more important that relying in apps.

item.title: The Importance of Theory of Knowledge
item.description: On why do we need to take a look about theory of knowledge

item.title: about
item.description: I am Muhammad Gaffar, a Muslim and PhD student. This blog is a collection of notes, essays, and mini libraries. Although formally doing physics, but the posts will cover range of my interests, see tags below.

item.title: Quick Links
item.description: Physics Arabic Self-Study Mandarin Self-Study Arxiv Textbook Mandarin Corner Phsyical Review Arabic Almanac Arc Chinese Sci-rate Lanes Lexicon HSK Reading The Quranic Corpus
